meaning: n.符咒,魅力,一段时间,轮班vt.拼写,拼成,意味着,轮值,招致,迷住vi.轮替,拼字
examples: I've never been able to spell.
How do you spell your surname?
Did I spell your name right?
He does not spell out the assets and liabilities that lie behind the total.
Arteta, who had a recent spell as captain, has only scored one goal himself this season.
